sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95243" key="skubaliko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῠβᾰλ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n95243.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dirty, mean</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀργυρίοισι σκυβαλικοῖσι</foreign>, of bribes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0265.tlg001:1:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Timocr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6</biblScope> </bibl> vulg., contra metrum; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κυβαλικοῖσι</foreign> Bgk.</sense> </entryFree>
